'''zhadudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jharokha|jharokha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jharokha|jharokha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhadudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædidhith|zhædidhith]] || [[word:zhædidhij|zhædidhij]] || [[word:zhædidhish|zhædidhish]] || [[word:zhædidhi|zhædidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadududhuth|zhadududhuth]] || [[word:zhadududhuj|zhadududhuj]] || [[word:zhadududhush|zhadududhush]] || [[word:zhadududhu|zhadududhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadudhuth|zhadudhuth]] || [[word:zhadudhuj|zhadudhuj]] || [[word:zhadudhush|zhadudhush]] || [[word:zhadudhu|zhadudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadufdhuth|zhadufdhuth]] || [[word:zhadufdhuj|zhadufdhuj]] || [[word:zhadufdhush|zhadufdhush]] || [[word:zhadufdhuf|zhadufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadudhuthu|zhadudhuthu]] || [[word:zhadudhuju|zhadudhuju]] || [[word:zhadudhushu|zhadudhushu]] || [[word:zhadudhuku|zhadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadudhuth|zhadudhuth]] || [[word:zhadudhuj|zhadudhuj]] || [[word:zhadudhush|zhadudhush]] || [[word:zhadudhu|zhadudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadudhuthul|zhadudhuthul]] || [[word:zhadudhujul|zhadudhujul]] || [[word:zhadudhushul|zhadudhushul]] || [[word:zhadudhukul|zhadudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadudhuthuthu|zhadudhuthuthu]] || [[word:zhadudhujuju|zhadudhujuju]] || [[word:zhadudhushushu|zhadudhushushu]] || [[word:zhadudhuku|zhadudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadudhuthun|zhadudhuthun]] || [[word:zhadudhujun|zhadudhujun]] || [[word:zhadudhushun|zhadudhushun]] || [[word:zhadudhukun|zhadudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadudhuthuoro|zhadudhuthuoro]] || [[word:zhadudhujuoro|zhadudhujuoro]] || [[word:zhadudhushuoro|zhadudhushuoro]] || [[word:zhadudhukuoro|zhadudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
